CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2026 Set For Trial On Feb-01-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Continued To Apr-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Disqualifying The Law Firm Of Bradford & Barthel, Llp From Representing Plaintiff, Lwp Claims Solutions, Inc., In This Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Supporting Declaration
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Peter Fitzpatrick, Esq. 909-476-0552 Bradford Barthel LLP for Plaintiff.
Kara Rand, Esq. 714-850-0210 Schumann Arevalo LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR #8052, 925-360-6065, chreporter@comcast.net.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Ms. Rand contests and presents arguments. The Court comments, poses questions and denies the request of Ms. Rand for additional briefing. Mr. Fitzpatrick responds. Ms. Rand presents brief rebuttal.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant's motion to disqualify counsel.

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
